name: User Proxy Agent

architecture.model: RAG + three-tier preference store + calibrated confidence

tiers.universal: Style invariants (naming, commits, language). Minimal, manual curated.
tiers.domain: Per-domain patterns (Python→FastAPI, DB→Postgres). Shared across same-domain projects.

correction_handling.strong_preference: 3+ corrections in same direction → promote to rule

anti_overfitting: Corrections scoped by context fingerprint (project + domain + decision type)
Supersede contradicting preferences rather than accumulating
Periodic distillation: review proxy_decisions.jsonl monthly → prune weak signals

advisor_mode.trigger: user IS present AND decision confidence < 0.85
advisor_mode.behavior: present analysis + recommendation, do NOT act

delegate_mode.trigger: user NOT present OR explicitly delegated
delegate_mode.behavior: act per confidence tiers, log all decisions

transferability.mechanism: Universal + Domain tiers follow user. Project tier stays with project.
transferability.onboarding: New project inherits universal/domain, starts empty project tier. First 5 decisions are always escalated to user to establish baseline.
